provenance: IP-clean replication. OpenMM 8.5.1 + amber14/RNA.OL3 + 12-6-4 ions. PDB 1ZIF (public). Personal laptop. April 13, 2026.

comparison.conclusion: Mg2+ stabilizes the GNRA tetraloop more than Li+. Li+ deforms the RNA backbone by 1.34 angstroms. Replicates Biowulf finding on personal hardware.
